title: Create: Winery
description: Build your own winery with Create.
body:
About

Create: Winery is an addon for Create which adds new wine-themed blocks, items and recipes using Create's mechanisms, allowing you to build your own winery!

Content

Red and White Grapes: Commonly found in plains and forest type biomes

Grape Pomace and Apple Must, made with Create's Mechanical Press

The Wine Cellar: A fully automatable workstation for making wine and cider

Red Wine, White Wine, Rosé and Cider, to drink with moderation...

Many other features and Create interractions to discover!

Screenshots

Tools for modpacks

You can add or remove beverages as possible outputs from the Wine Cellar, using item tags:

• Red Wines: red_wines
• White Wines: white_wines
• Rosé Wines: rose_wines
• Ciders: ciders

Structure is as follows: create_winery:{tag}

Dependencies

This mod requires Create for all of the features to work, but can technically be played without.

JEI is recommended for recipes but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
